commit_scope: Make Form validation source and fourth-kernel caches safe under parallel runs

commands: coord claim source-compile-cache-race "repair validate.sh concurrent source-compile temp/cache race causing raw section files in full Form suite; prove binary-symbol-lens and context-domain-media lens plus full-suite behavior"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/python-bmf.fk form-stdlib/grammars/typescript-bmf.fk form-stdlib/tests/binary-symbol-lens-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/natural-bmf.fk form-stdlib/grammars/image-bmf.fk form-stdlib/grammars/audio-bmf.fk form-stdlib/grammars/video-bmf.fk form-stdlib/tests/context-domain-media-lens-band.fk
cd form && rm -f form-stdlib/.cache/fourth/fkwu-* form-stdlib/.cache/fourth/.fkwu-* 2>/dev/null || true; run both focused validates in parallel
cd form && rm -rf form-stdlib/.cache/source-compiled && mkdir -p form-stdlib/.cache/source-compiled && ./validate.sh
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
